titleJa: multi-agent workflow そのものが product surface になり始める
titleEn: Multi-agent workflows are starting to become a product surface in their own right
summaryJa: 2025年12月時点では、Azure AI Foundry の multi-agent workflows 発表を受け、multi-agent collaboration が SDK の内側だけでなく製品として可視化される段階に入っていた。
summaryEn: By December 2025, Azure AI Foundry's multi-agent workflows announcement showed that multi-agent collaboration was becoming visible not just inside SDKs but as a product surface of its own.

publishedSources.label: Magentic-One: A Generalist Multi-Agent System for Solving Complex Tasks
RE-Bench: Evaluating Frontier AI R&D Capabilities of Language Model Agents against Human Experts
Microsoft: Introducing multi-agent workflows in Azure AI Foundry Agent Service
